title: Iran war ‘stark wake-up call’ for fossil fuel- dependent Southeast Asia: IEA report
description: The Iran war has exposed major risks for Southeast Asia that could cost the region billions of dollars, if it does not diversify sources of energy more quickly, according to an International Energy Agency (IEA) report released on Tuesday. An overreliance on oil and gas transported through the Strait of Hormuz left the region particularly vulnerable to shocks from the Iran war, a “stark wake-up call” for its energy security, the report says. It notes that rising sales of electric vehicles, a...

title: Global fossil fuel use must HALVE by 2035 to avoid catastrophic climate damage, scientists claim
description: The report, by Climate Analytics, looked at the measures that need to be taken to keep global warming below 1.5°C by the end of the century.

title: Ancient temples surface as Kabini Dam level recedes
description: Mysuru: The receding waters of the Kabini reservoir have once again brought to the surface remnants of ancient temples and cultural heritage sites that have remained submerged for decades. With water levels dropping sharply, stone structures, temple ruins and sculptures have emerged from the backwaters, offering a rare glimpse into the region’s forgotten past. Among the remains now visible are weathered inscriptions, idols... The post Ancient temples surface as Kabini Dam level recedes appeared first on Star of Mysore .
